items.title: Derrick White earns a spot on the All-Defensive First Team.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Derrick White earns a spot on the All-Defensive First Team.

-1/2 players with at least 80 steals & 80+ blocks (Scottie Barnes)

-3rd in defensive win shares

-Most shots contested among guards

-1st Celtic with 75+ blocks and 75+ steals in a season since when Kevin Garnett won the DPOY in 2007-08
